About Apex Electrical

12+ years serving Dallas and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Apex Electrical has grown from a small family-owned business into one of Dallas' most trusted electrical contractors. We've worked on everything from historic Oak Cliff homes to sleek Uptown condos.

Our approach blends old-school craftsmanship with modern safety standards. Every job begins with a thorough inspection and ends with a meticulous cleanup—because your home deserves nothing less.

We’re proud to support local Little Leagues and the Dallas Arts District. When you hire us, you’re investing in a team that cares deeply about this community.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Apex Electrical

Trusted electrical professionals serving Dallas, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-ele-r92
